name: IDBI Bank Imperium Platinum Credit Card
tagline: Secured credit card against fixed deposit with rewards and Visa benefits
description: The IDBI Bank Imperium Platinum Credit Card is a secured credit card issued against a Fixed Deposit, offering up to 85% of the FD value as credit limit. Ideal for first-time credit users, students, and those building credit history. Earn Delight Points on shopping, movies, and travel spends while enjoying exclusive Visa benefits and special offers on car rentals, hotels, and airport shopping.

notes: Secured card against Fixed Deposit with IDBI Bank
Credit limit up to 85% of FD value

charges.label: Annual Fee
charges.note: Plus applicable GST from second year

benefits.title: Welcome Benefit - Delight Points
benefits.description: Earn 500 Delight Points on spending Rs 1,500 or more in a single transaction within 30 days of card issuance, or 300 Delight Points if spend is achieved between 30-90 days.
conditions: Spend Rs 1,500+ in a single transaction within 30 days for 500 DP
Spend Rs 1,500+ in a single transaction between 30-90 days for 300 DP
No welcome benefit if spend threshold not met within 90 days

benefits.title: Reward Points on Shopping, Movies & Travel
benefits.description: Earn 2 Delight Points for every Rs 150 spent on shopping, movies, and travel categories.
conditions: Applies to shopping, movies, and travel categories
Other categories may earn reduced points
Fuel, wallet loads, and utility bills may be excluded

benefits.title: Visa Benefits - Car Rentals & Hotels
benefits.description: Enjoy special offers on car rentals, hotel bookings, and airport shopping through the Visa benefits program.
conditions: Offers subject to Visa partner availability
Discounts vary by merchant and season
Must book through Visa benefits portal

benefits.title: Visa Airport Shopping Benefits
benefits.description: Get exclusive discounts at participating airport retail outlets through the Visa benefits program.
conditions: Applicable at participating airport outlets only
Discount percentage varies by merchant
Present card at time of purchase

benefits.title: FD-Backed Credit Limit
benefits.description: Get a credit limit of up to 85% of your Fixed Deposit value with IDBI Bank. Your FD continues to earn interest.
conditions: Credit limit up to 85% of FD value
FD must be maintained with IDBI Bank
FD continues to earn interest as per applicable rates
Card valid as long as FD is active

benefits.title: Cash Withdrawal Facility
benefits.description: Withdraw cash up to 70% of your total credit limit from any ATM in India and abroad.
conditions: Cash withdrawal up to 70% of credit limit
Interest applicable from day of withdrawal
ATM charges as per applicable schedule

rewardProgram.name: IDBI Delight Points
rewardProgram.earnRate: 2 DP per Rs 150 on shopping, movies, travel

bonusCategories.description: 2 Delight Points per Rs 150 on shopping
2 Delight Points per Rs 150 on movie tickets
2 Delight Points per Rs 150 on travel bookings

conditions: Points credited within 30 days of transaction posting
Points expire 2 years from accrual date
Minimum 500 points required for redemption

welcomeBonus.description: Earn 500 Delight Points on spending Rs 1,500+ in a single transaction within 30 days, or 300 DP between 30-90 days.
conditions: Spend Rs 1,500+ in single transaction within 30 days: 500 DP
Spend Rs 1,500+ in single transaction between 30-90 days: 300 DP
No benefit if threshold not met within 90 days

feeWaivers.description: Annual fee waived on annual spend of Rs 50,000

features: Credit limit up to 85% of FD value
Cash withdrawal up to 70% of credit limit
Visa benefits on car rentals, hotels, airport shopping
Reward points on shopping, movies, travel

reviews.summary: Good entry-level secured credit card for those building credit with FD backing and decent rewards.
pros: FD-backed with up to 85% credit limit
Visa benefits on travel and shopping
cons: Limited to FD value for credit
